en: Helo! I'm U-Pal, your UWTSD student assistant. I can help you with admissions, courses, fees, accommodation, IT support, wellbeing and more. What would you like to know? 😊
Hi there! Welcome to U-Pal — your guide to all things UWTSD. Ask me anything about student life, courses, or university services!
cy: Helo! U-Pal ydw i, eich cynorthwyydd myfyrwyr PCYDDS. Gallaf eich helpu gyda derbyniadau, cyrsiau, ffioedd, llety, cymorth TG, lles a mwy. Beth hoffech chi wybod? 😊
Shwmae! Croeso i U-Pal — eich canllaw i bopeth am PCYDDS. Gofynnwch unrhyw beth am fywyd myfyrwyr, cyrsiau neu wasanaethau'r brifysgol!

en: Goodbye! Good luck with your studies at UWTSD. Feel free to come back if you have more questions! 👋
Take care! If you need anything else, U-Pal is always here to help. Good luck! 😊
cy: Da boch chi! Pob lwc gyda'ch astudiaethau ym PCYDDS. Croeso i ddod nôl os oes gennych fwy o gwestiynau! 👋
Hwyl fawr! Os oes angen unrhyw beth arall arnoch chi, mae U-Pal bob amser yma i helpu. Pob lwc! 😊

en: You're welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with? 😊
Happy to help! Let me know if you have any other questions about UWTSD.
cy: Croeso! Oes unrhyw beth arall y gallaf eich helpu ag ef? 😊
Hapus i helpu! Rhowch wybod os oes gennych gwestiynau eraill am PCYDDS.

en: I'm doing great, thanks for asking! I'm U-Pal — a student support chatbot built for UWTSD students. I can answer questions about admissions, courses, fees, accommodation, campus life, wellbeing, IT and more. What can I help you with?
I'm a chatbot so always ready to help! I'm U-Pal, trained to answer questions about UWTSD university life. Ask away!
cy: Rydw i'n iawn diolch! U-Pal ydw i — chatbot cymorth myfyrwyr wedi'i adeiladu ar gyfer myfyrwyr PCYDDS. Gallaf ateb cwestiynau am dderbyniadau, cyrsiau, ffioedd, llety, bywyd campws, lles, TG a mwy. Beth alla i ei helpu gydag ef?
Chatbot ydw i felly bob amser yn barod i helpu! U-Pal ydw i, wedi fy hyfforddi i ateb cwestiynau am fywyd prifysgol PCYDDS. Gofynnwch!

patterns: sut mae gwneud cais i pcydds

en: To apply to UWTSD, you can apply directly through the UWTSD website at uwtsd.ac.uk or through UCAS (ucas.com) for undergraduate courses. International students can also apply directly. Head to uwtsd.ac.uk/study and choose your course to get started. The admissions team can also help on 01267 676767.

Applying to UWTSD is straightforward! For most undergraduate courses, apply via UCAS (ucas.com). For postgraduate or direct entry, go to uwtsd.ac.uk/study. You'll need to choose your campus preference — Swansea, Carmarthen, or Lampeter. Need help choosing a course? Just ask!
cy: I wneud cais i PCYDDS, gallwch wneud cais yn uniongyrchol trwy wefan PCYDDS ar pcydds.ac.uk neu trwy UCAS (ucas.com) ar gyfer cyrsiau israddedig. Gall myfyrwyr rhyngwladol hefyd wneud cais yn uniongyrchol. Ewch i pcydds.ac.uk/study a dewis eich cwrs i ddechrau. Gall y tîm derbyniadau hefyd helpu ar 01267 676767.

Mae gwneud cais i PCYDDS yn syml! Ar gyfer y rhan fwyaf o gyrsiau israddedig, gwnewch gais trwy UCAS (ucas.com). Ar gyfer mynediad ôl-raddedig neu uniongyrchol, ewch i pcydds.ac.uk/study. Bydd angen i chi ddewis campws — Abertawe, Caerfyrddin, neu Llanbedr Pont Steffan.

patterns: what do I need to get in
beth sydd ei angen i fynd i mewn

en: Entry requirements vary by course at UWTSD. Most undergraduate courses require 80-120 UCAS points (roughly 2-3 A-levels at grades C or above). Some courses like nursing or teacher training may have specific requirements. UWTSD also considers mature students, Access to HE qualifications, and BTECs. Check the specific course page at uwtsd.ac.uk for exact requirements!

Requirements differ by course — some need specific subjects, others are more flexible. UWTSD welcomes students with A-levels, BTECs, Access to HE, Scottish Highers, and Welsh Baccalaureate. Foundation year options are also available if you don't quite meet the standard entry requirements. Check uwtsd.ac.uk for your specific course.
cy: Mae gofynion mynediad yn amrywio yn ôl cwrs ym PCYDDS. Mae'r rhan fwyaf o gyrsiau israddedig yn gofyn am 80-120 pwynt UCAS (tua 2-3 lefel A ar raddau C neu uwch). Gallai rhai cyrsiau fel nyrsio neu hyfforddiant athrawon fod â gofynion penodol. Mae PCYDDS hefyd yn ystyried myfyrwyr aeddfed, cymwysterau Mynediad i AU, a BTECs.

Mae gofynion yn amrywio yn ôl cwrs — mae rhai yn gofyn am bynciau penodol, mae eraill yn fwy hyblyg. Mae PCYDDS yn croesawu myfyrwyr â lefelau A, BTECs, Mynediad i AU, Uwch Raddau Albanaidd, a Bagloriaeth Cymru. Mae opsiynau blwyddyn sylfaen hefyd ar gael.

en: The main UCAS deadline for most undergraduate courses is usually mid-January for entry the following September. However, UWTSD often accepts applications through UCAS Extra and Clearing after this date. Some postgraduate and part-time courses have rolling admissions throughout the year. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/study or call 01267 676767 for the latest deadlines.

Key deadlines: UCAS main deadline is usually 29 January for September entry. UWTSD also participates in Clearing (from mid-August) for students who get better or worse results than expected. Postgraduate courses often have flexible deadlines — contact admissions at admissions@uwtsd.ac.uk for specifics.
cy: Y prif ddyddiad cau UCAS ar gyfer y rhan fwyaf o gyrsiau israddedig fel arfer yw canol Ionawr ar gyfer mynediad y mis Medi canlynol. Fodd bynnag, mae PCYDDS yn aml yn derbyn ceisiadau trwy UCAS Extra a Chlirio ar ôl y dyddiad hwn. Mae rhai cyrsiau ôl-raddedig a rhan-amser yn cael derbyniadau parhaus trwy gydol y flwyddyn.

Dyddiadau allweddol: Y prif ddyddiad cau UCAS fel arfer yw 29 Ionawr ar gyfer mynediad ym mis Medi. Mae PCYDDS hefyd yn cymryd rhan mewn Clirio (o ganol mis Awst) ar gyfer myfyrwyr sydd â chanlyniadau gwell neu waeth na'r disgwyl. Cysylltwch â derbyniadau ar admissions@uwtsd.ac.uk am fanylion penodol.

en: International students are very welcome at UWTSD! You can apply directly through uwtsd.ac.uk/international. You'll likely need a Student Visa (formerly Tier 4) if you're from outside the UK. UWTSD has an International Office to support you — contact them at international@uwtsd.ac.uk or visit uwtsd.ac.uk/international for visa guidance, language requirements, and support services.

UWTSD welcomes students from over 50 countries! Apply via uwtsd.ac.uk/international. Key things international students need: proof of English language proficiency (usually IELTS 6.0+), academic transcripts, and a valid passport. The International Office can guide you through the visa process — email international@uwtsd.ac.uk.
cy: Mae myfyrwyr rhyngwladol yn fwy na chroesawus ym PCYDDS! Gallwch wneud cais yn uniongyrchol trwy pcydds.ac.uk/international. Bydd angen Fisa Myfyriwr arnoch chi (gynt Lefel 4) os ydych chi o'r tu allan i'r DU. Mae gan PCYDDS Swyddfa Ryngwladol i'ch cefnogi — cysylltwch â nhw ar international@uwtsd.ac.uk.

Mae PCYDDS yn croesawu myfyrwyr o dros 50 gwlad! Ymgeisiwch trwy pcydds.ac.uk/international. Pethau allweddol sydd eu hangen ar fyfyrwyr rhyngwladol: tystiolaeth o hyfedredd yn y Saesneg (fel arfer IELTS 6.0+), trawsgrifiadau academaidd, a phasbort dilys.

patterns: nid wyf yn bodloni gofynion mynediad

en: Yes! UWTSD offers Foundation Year programmes for students who don't quite meet the standard entry requirements. This is a fantastic option if you've been out of education for a while, are a mature student, or have non-traditional qualifications. Successfully completing the Foundation Year guarantees progression to Year 1 of your chosen degree. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/study for available foundation pathways.

UWTSD's Foundation Year is a great stepping stone into university! It's designed for mature students, those returning to education, or those with non-standard qualifications. You study at degree level but with extra support. After passing, you move into Year 1. Ask admissions at admissions@uwtsd.ac.uk about which degrees offer a foundation year entry.
cy: Oes! Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig rhaglenni Blwyddyn Sylfaen ar gyfer myfyrwyr nad ydynt yn bodloni'r gofynion mynediad safonol. Mae hwn yn opsiwn gwych os ydych chi wedi bod allan o addysg am sbel, yn fyfyriwr aeddfed, neu â chymwysterau anhraddodiadol. Mae cwblhau'r Flwyddyn Sylfaen yn llwyddiannus yn gwarantu symud ymlaen i Flwyddyn 1 eich gradd ddewisol.

Mae Blwyddyn Sylfaen PCYDDS yn gam gwych i mewn i'r brifysgol! Mae wedi'i gynllunio ar gyfer myfyrwyr aeddfed, y rhai sy'n dychwelyd i addysg, neu'r rhai â chymwysterau anhraddodiadol. Ar ôl pasio, byddwch yn symud i Flwyddyn 1. Gofynnwch i dderbyniadau ar admissions@uwtsd.ac.uk am ba raddau sy'n cynnig mynediad blwyddyn sylfaen.

patterns: pa raddau mae pcydds yn eu cynnig

en: UWTSD offers a huge range of courses including Art & Design, Business, Computing, Education, Engineering, Health & Social Care, Humanities, Law, Nursing, Psychology, Sport Science, Social Work, Welsh and many more! Courses are available at undergraduate, postgraduate, and professional levels across Swansea, Carmarthen, and Lampeter campuses. Browse the full list at uwtsd.ac.uk/study.

UWTSD has over 100 courses across its campuses! Highlights include strong programmes in Education, Nursing, Art & Design, Business, Welsh medium courses, and Sustainability. Some courses are only available at specific campuses. Visit uwtsd.ac.uk/study and filter by subject, level, or campus to find what suits you.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig ystod enfawr o gyrsiau gan gynnwys Celf a Dylunio, Busnes, Cyfrifiadureg, Addysg, Peirianneg, Iechyd a Gofal Cymdeithasol, Dyniaethau, y Gyfraith, Nyrsio, Seicoleg, Gwyddor Chwaraeon, Gwaith Cymdeithasol, Cymraeg a llawer mwy! Browiwch y rhestr lawn ar pcydds.ac.uk/study.

Mae gan PCYDDS dros 100 o gyrsiau ar draws ei champysau! Mae PCYDDS yn adnabyddus am ei rhaglenni Addysg, Nyrsio, Celf a Dylunio, Busnes, cyrsiau cyfrwng Cymraeg, a Chynaliadwyedd. Ymwelwch â pcydds.ac.uk/study a hidlwch yn ôl pwnc, lefel, neu gampws.

en: UWTSD offers Computing and IT-related degrees mainly at the Swansea campus (SA1 Waterfront). Courses include BSc Computer Science, BSc Software Engineering, BSc Cybersecurity, and related programmes. These are accredited and industry-focused. Visit uwtsd.ac.uk/study and search 'computing' for the full course list and entry requirements.

Yes! UWTSD has a strong Computing department at Swansea. Courses cover programming, networking, cybersecurity, software development, and data science. Many have industry placements. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/study for up-to-date course details and UCAS codes.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig graddau Cyfrifiadureg a TG yn bennaf ar gampws Abertawe (Glanfa SA1). Mae cyrsiau'n cynnwys BSc Gwyddor Cyfrifiadur, BSc Peirianneg Meddalwedd, BSc Seiberddiogelwch, a rhaglenni cysylltiedig. Ewch i pcydds.ac.uk/study a chwiliwch am 'cyfrifiadureg' am y rhestr cwrs lawn.

Oes! Mae gan PCYDDS adran Cyfrifiadureg gref yn Abertawe. Mae cyrsiau'n ymdrin â rhaglennu, rhwydweithio, seiberddiogelwch, datblygu meddalwedd, a gwyddor data. Mae gan lawer ohonynt leoliadau diwydiannol.

en: UWTSD has an excellent reputation for Nursing and Health Sciences! Courses include Adult Nursing (BSc), Mental Health Nursing (BSc), and various Health & Social Care programmes. Nursing courses are primarily based at the Swansea campus. They are NMC-accredited and include clinical placements throughout the programme. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/study for current intake dates.

Nursing at UWTSD is highly regarded. The BSc Nursing programmes (Adult and Mental Health) include real clinical placements across NHS Wales. Based mainly at Swansea, with some teaching at Carmarthen. UWTSD works closely with NHS Wales Trusts. Entry requirements typically include specific science GCSEs. See uwtsd.ac.uk/nursing for details.
cy: Mae gan PCYDDS enw da rhagorol am Nyrsio a Gwyddorau Iechyd! Mae cyrsiau'n cynnwys Nyrsio Oedolion (BSc), Nyrsio Iechyd Meddwl (BSc), a rhaglenni Iechyd a Gofal Cymdeithasol amrywiol. Mae cyrsiau Nyrsio wedi'u lleoli'n bennaf ar gampws Abertawe.

Mae Nyrsio ym PCYDDS yn cael ei ystyried yn uchel. Mae rhaglenni BSc Nyrsio (Oedolion ac Iechyd Meddwl) yn cynnwys lleoliadau clinigol go iawn ar draws GIG Cymru. Gweler pcydds.ac.uk/nursing am fanylion.

en: UWTSD is one of Wales' leading teacher training institutions! Courses include BA Education (Primary), PGCE Primary, PGCE Secondary (various subjects), and BA Childhood Studies. The Carmarthen campus is the main hub for Education. UWTSD is accredited by the Education Workforce Council (EWC) of Wales. Visit uwtsd.ac.uk/study for current courses.

Teacher training at UWTSD is mainly based at Carmarthen campus. You can train to teach in Welsh-medium or English-medium schools. Programmes include the PGCE (Postgraduate Certificate in Education) and undergraduate BA Education. Placement schools are local — keeping you in the community during training.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn un o sefydliadau hyfforddi athrawon blaenllaw Cymru! Mae cyrsiau'n cynnwys BA Addysg (Cynradd), TAR Cynradd, TAR Uwchradd (pynciau amrywiol), a BA Astudiaethau Plentyndod. Campws Caerfyrddin yw'r prif ganolfan ar gyfer Addysg. Ymwelwch â pcydds.ac.uk/study am gyrsiau cyfredol.

Mae hyfforddiant athrawon ym PCYDDS wedi'i leoli'n bennaf ar gampws Caerfyrddin. Gallwch hyfforddi i ddysgu mewn ysgolion cyfrwng Cymraeg neu Saesneg. Mae rhaglenni'n cynnwys y TAR (Tystysgrif Addysg Raddedig) a BA Addysg israddedig.

en: Tuition fees at UWTSD for home (UK) students are currently £9,000 per year for most full-time undergraduate courses. Welsh students may be eligible for a Tuition Fee Loan from Student Finance Wales to cover the full amount, so you don't pay upfront! Postgraduate fees vary. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/fees for the latest confirmed amounts.

For 2024/25 entry, UWTSD charges £9,000 per year for full-time undergraduate courses. Good news — Welsh-domiciled students can apply for a Tuition Fee Loan to cover this in full, repaid through your salary once you earn over the threshold. Part-time fees are pro-rata. See uwtsd.ac.uk/fees for full details.
cy: Mae ffioedd dysgu ym PCYDDS ar gyfer myfyrwyr cartref (DU) ar hyn o bryd yn £9,000 y flwyddyn ar gyfer y rhan fwyaf o gyrsiau israddedig amser llawn. Efallai y bydd myfyrwyr Cymreig yn gymwys am Fenthyciad Ffi Dysgu gan Gyllid Myfyrwyr Cymru i dalu'r swm llawn, felly nid ydych yn talu ymlaen llaw!

Am fynediad 2024/25, mae PCYDDS yn codi £9,000 y flwyddyn ar gyfer cyrsiau israddedig amser llawn. Newyddion da — gall myfyrwyr sy'n byw yng Nghymru wneud cais am Fenthyciad Ffi Dysgu i dalu hyn yn llawn. Gweler pcydds.ac.uk/fees am fanylion llawn.

en: Student Finance Wales (studentfinancewales.co.uk) provides Tuition Fee Loans and Maintenance Loans for eligible Welsh-domiciled students. You can borrow up to £9,000 for fees and a maintenance loan towards living costs. Applications typically open in spring for the following academic year. You only start repaying once you earn over £25,000. Contact Student Finance Wales at 0300 200 4050.

Welsh students studying at UWTSD can apply to Student Finance Wales for: 1) Tuition Fee Loan — covers your fees entirely, 2) Maintenance Loan — helps with living costs (amount depends on household income and whether you live at home or away). Apply at studentfinancewales.co.uk — it's free to apply and you won't pay anything upfront!
cy: Mae Cyllid Myfyrwyr Cymru (cyllidmyfyrwyrcymru.co.uk) yn darparu Benthyciadau Ffi Dysgu a Benthyciadau Cynhaliaeth ar gyfer myfyrwyr cymwys sy'n byw yng Nghymru. Gallwch fenthyca hyd at £9,000 am ffioedd a benthyciad cynhaliaeth tuag at gostau byw. Ffoniwch 0300 200 4050.

Gall myfyrwyr Cymreig sy'n astudio ym PCYDDS wneud cais i Gyllid Myfyrwyr Cymru am: 1) Benthyciad Ffi Dysgu — yn talu eich ffioedd yn llawn, 2) Benthyciad Cynhaliaeth — yn helpu gyda chostau byw. Ymgeisiwch ar cyllidmyfyrwyrcymru.co.uk — mae'n rhad ac am ddim i wneud cais!

patterns: arian am ddim ar gyfer prifysgol

en: UWTSD offers a range of scholarships and bursaries! These include sports scholarships, Welsh language scholarships, subject-specific bursaries, and care leaver bursaries. Awards vary from a few hundred to several thousand pounds. Visit uwtsd.ac.uk/scholarships or contact finance@uwtsd.ac.uk for the full current list and eligibility criteria.

There are several funding opportunities at UWTSD: Welsh-medium study bursaries (for studying through Welsh), sports performance scholarships, subject bursaries, and hardship funds. The Students' Union also has emergency funds. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/scholarships and apply early — many have limited spaces!
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig ystod o ysgoloriaethau a bwrsariaethau! Mae'r rhain yn cynnwys ysgoloriaethau chwaraeon, ysgoloriaethau iaith Gymraeg, bwrsariaethau penodol i bynciau, a bwrsariaethau gofalwyr. Ewch i pcydds.ac.uk/scholarships neu cysylltwch â finance@uwtsd.ac.uk am y rhestr gyfredol lawn.

Mae sawl cyfle cyllido ym PCYDDS: bwrsariaethau astudio cyfrwng Cymraeg, ysgoloriaethau perfformiad chwaraeon, bwrsariaethau pwnc, a chronfeydd caledi. Edrychwch ar pcydds.ac.uk/scholarships a gwnewch gais yn gynnar!

en: The UWTSD student portal is called MyStudy and you can access it at mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk. You'll need your student ID number and password (set up when you enrolled). Through MyStudy you can view timetables, access student services, check notices, and more. If you're having login issues, contact IT Services on 01792 481 111 or itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk.

MyStudy (mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk) is your main student portal. Your login is your student number and the password you created at enrolment. Forgotten your password? Use the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page or call IT Services on 01792 481 111.
cy: Porth myfyrwyr PCYDDS yw MyStudy a gallwch ei gyrchu ar mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk. Bydd angen eich rhif myfyriwr a chyfrinair arnoch chi. Drwy MyStudy gallwch weld amserlenni, cyrchu gwasanaethau myfyrwyr, gwirio hysbysiadau, a mwy. Os oes problemau mewngofnodi, cysylltwch â Gwasanaethau TG ar 01792 481 111.

MyStudy (mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk) yw eich prif borth myfyrwyr. Eich mewngofnodiad yw eich rhif myfyriwr a'r cyfrinair a greoch chi yn ystod cofrestru. Wedi anghofio eich cyfrinair? Defnyddiwch y ddolen 'Anghofio Cyfrinair' ar y dudalen mewngofnodi neu ffoniwch Wasanaethau TG ar 01792 481 111.

en: UWTSD uses Moodle as its Virtual Learning Environment (VLE). You can access it at vle.uwtsd.ac.uk. Log in with your student username and password. On Moodle you'll find your course materials, lecture notes, assignment briefs, and can submit work. If you can't access your modules, contact your lecturer or IT Services at itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk.

Moodle is UWTSD's online learning platform — find it at vle.uwtsd.ac.uk. All your course content, reading lists, recordings, and submission portals are there. Use your student credentials to log in. New to Moodle? There are help guides on the IT Services page at uwtsd.ac.uk/it.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn defnyddio Moodle fel ei Amgylchedd Dysgu Rhithwir (VLE). Gallwch ei gyrchu ar vle.uwtsd.ac.uk. Mewngofnodwch gyda'ch enw defnyddiwr a chyfrinair myfyrwyr. Ar Moodle byddwch yn dod o hyd i'ch deunyddiau cwrs, nodiadau darlith, briffiau aseiniad, a gallwch gyflwyno gwaith.

Moodle yw platfform dysgu ar-lein PCYDDS — dewch o hyd iddo ar vle.uwtsd.ac.uk. Mae'ch holl gynnwys cwrs, rhestrau darllen, recordiadau, a phortholau cyflwyno yno. Defnyddiwch eich manylion myfyrwyr i fewngofnodi.

en: For IT support at UWTSD, contact IT Services: Phone: 01792 481 111, Email: itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk, or visit the IT Service Desk on campus. They can help with password resets, software access, wifi issues, laptop problems, and more. Opening hours are usually Monday–Friday 8:30am–5pm during term time.

UWTSD IT Services can be reached at itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk or 01792 481 111. They handle everything from login problems and Moodle access to wifi and printing. There's also a self-service portal at uwtsd.ac.uk/it for common issues and guides.
cy: Am gymorth TG ym PCYDDS, cysylltwch â Gwasanaethau TG: Ffôn: 01792 481 111, E-bost: itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk, neu ewch i Ddesg Gwasanaeth TG ar y campws. Gallant helpu gydag ailosod cyfrineiriau, mynediad meddalwedd, problemau wifi, problemau gliniadur, a mwy.
Gellir cysylltu â Gwasanaethau TG PCYDDS ar itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk neu 01792 481 111. Maent yn ymdrin â phopeth o broblemau mewngofnodi a mynediad Moodle i wifi ac argraffu.

en: UWTSD campuses use the eduroam wifi network. To connect: select 'eduroam' on your device, enter your full UWTSD email address (e.g. student@uwtsd.ac.uk) and your student password. Eduroam works at universities worldwide! If you have trouble connecting, contact IT Services at 01792 481 111 or itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk.

The campus wifi is eduroam — available across all UWTSD buildings. Use your student email and password to connect. The great thing about eduroam is it works at most universities in the UK and around the world! Problems connecting? IT Services on 01792 481 111 can help.
cy: Mae campysau PCYDDS yn defnyddio rhwydwaith wifi eduroam. I gysylltu: dewiswch 'eduroam' ar eich dyfais, rhowch eich cyfeiriad e-bost PCYDDS llawn (e.e. myfyriwr@pcydds.ac.uk) a'ch cyfrinair myfyrwyr. Mae eduroam yn gweithio mewn prifysgolion ledled y byd!

Wifi y campws yw eduroam — ar gael ar draws holl adeiladau PCYDDS. Defnyddiwch eich e-bost myfyrwyr a chyfrinair i gysylltu. Y peth gwych am eduroam yw ei fod yn gweithio yn y rhan fwyaf o brifysgolion yn y DU ac o amgylch y byd!

en: UWTSD offers student accommodation at the Swansea and Carmarthen campuses. Options include en-suite and shared bathroom rooms in halls of residence. Accommodation is great for first-year students and those new to the area. To apply, visit uwtsd.ac.uk/accommodation or contact accommodation@uwtsd.ac.uk. It's popular, so apply early!

UWTSD has on-campus accommodation available, particularly at Swansea and Carmarthen. Rooms range from standard to en-suite. Halls are fully catered or self-catered depending on the campus. Private student accommodation is also available in Swansea city centre. Contact accommodation@uwtsd.ac.uk for availability and pricing.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig llety myfyrwyr ar gampysau Abertawe a Chaerfyrddin. Mae opsiynau'n cynnwys ystafelloedd en-suite a chyfleusterau ymolchi a rennir mewn neuaddau preswyl. I wneud cais, ewch i pcydds.ac.uk/llety neu cysylltwch ag accommodation@uwtsd.ac.uk.
Mae gan PCYDDS lety ar y campws ar gael, yn enwedig yn Abertawe a Chaerfyrddin. Mae ystafelloedd yn amrywio o safonol i en-suite. Cysylltwch ag accommodation@uwtsd.ac.uk am argaeledd a phrisiau.

en: Accommodation prices at UWTSD vary by campus and room type. Generally, you can expect to pay around £90–£140 per week for a standard room in halls. En-suite rooms are slightly more. Prices usually include utilities (electricity, heating, wifi). Check uwtsd.ac.uk/accommodation for the latest rates or email accommodation@uwtsd.ac.uk.

UWTSD accommodation typically costs £90–£140 per week depending on room type and campus. Most rooms include wifi, water, heating and electricity in the price. Compared to private renting, halls offer great value and convenience, especially in your first year. Visit uwtsd.ac.uk/accommodation for current pricing.
cy: Mae prisiau llety ym PCYDDS yn amrywio yn ôl campws a math o ystafell. Yn gyffredinol, gallwch ddisgwyl talu oddeutu £90–£140 yr wythnos am ystafell safonol mewn neuaddau. Mae ystafelloedd en-suite ychydig yn fwy. Edrychwch ar pcydds.ac.uk/llety am y cyfraddau diweddaraf.
Mae llety PCYDDS fel arfer yn costio £90–£140 yr wythnos yn dibynnu ar fath yr ystafell a'r campws. Mae'r rhan fwyaf o ystafelloedd yn cynnwys wifi, dŵr, gwres a thrydan yn y pris.

en: UWTSD has three main campuses: 1) Swansea (SA1 Waterfront) — the largest campus in the heart of Swansea city. 2) Carmarthen — a traditional campus with strong education and sport programmes. 3) Lampeter — a historic, small-town campus famous for humanities and Welsh studies. There is also a Cardiff campus for some professional courses. Each campus has its own character and community!

UWTSD operates across multiple locations: Swansea SA1 (main campus, city centre), Carmarthen (leafy town campus), Lampeter (small historic campus in Ceredigion), and Cardiff (select courses). The campus you study at depends on your course. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/campuses for maps and facilities.
cy: Mae gan PCYDDS dri phrif gampws: 1) Abertawe (Glanfa SA1) — y campws mwyaf yng nghanol dinas Abertawe. 2) Caerfyrddin — campws traddodiadol gyda rhaglenni addysg a chwaraeon cryf. 3) Llanbedr Pont Steffan — campws hanesyddol mewn tref fach enwog am ddyniaethau ac astudiaethau Cymraeg. Mae campws Caerdydd hefyd ar gyfer rhai cyrsiau proffesiynol.

Mae PCYDDS yn gweithredu mewn sawl lleoliad: SA1 Abertawe (prif gampws, canol dinas), Caerfyrddin (campws tref), Llanbedr Pont Steffan (campws hanesyddol bach yng Ngheredigion), a Chaerdydd (cyrsiau dethol).

en: The Swansea campus is located at the SA1 Waterfront, right by the docks in central Swansea. The postcode is SA1 8EW. It's easily accessible by bus, train (Swansea station is a short walk/bus away), and there is nearby parking. The campus has modern facilities including computing labs, studios, a library, and social spaces. It's the largest UWTSD campus.

UWTSD Swansea is at SA1 Waterfront — a stunning modern campus right next to the bay. Address: Swansea Waterfront, SA1 8EW. Close to Swansea city centre shops, transport links, and accommodation. Courses here include Computing, Nursing, Business, Art & Design, and more.
cy: Mae campws Abertawe wedi'i leoli yn Glanfa SA1, wrth ymyl y dociau yng nghanol Abertawe. Y cod post yw SA1 8EW. Mae'n hawdd ei gyrraedd ar fws, trên (mae gorsaf Abertawe ychydig gamau i ffwrdd), ac mae parcio cyfagos. Mae gan y campws gyfleusterau modern.
Mae PCYDDS Abertawe yn Glanfa SA1 — campws modern syfrdanol wrth ymyl y bae. Cyfeiriad: Glanfa Abertawe, SA1 8EW. Yn agos at siopau canol dinas Abertawe, cysylltiadau trafnidiaeth, a llety.

en: The Carmarthen campus is UWTSD's traditional site in the market town of Carmarthen, West Wales. It's known for its strong Education, Early Years, and Sport Science programmes. The campus has a friendly, close-knit community feel. Carmarthen is well connected by train and bus. Address: Carmarthen SA31 3EP.

UWTSD's Carmarthen campus sits on a hill above the town — a beautiful, leafy setting. It's home to Education, Sport, Drama, and Welsh medium courses. There's on-campus accommodation, sports facilities, and a Students' Union bar. Address: Carmarthen SA31 3EP. Easily accessible from Swansea, Cardiff, and West Wales.
cy: Mae campws Caerfyrddin yn safle traddodiadol PCYDDS yn nhref farchnad Caerfyrddin, Gorllewin Cymru. Mae'n adnabyddus am ei raglenni Addysg, Blynyddoedd Cynnar, a Gwyddor Chwaraeon cryf. Mae gan y campws ymdeimlad cymunedol agos-atoch.

Mae campws Caerfyrddin PCYDDS ar fryn uwchben y dref — lleoliad hardd, llawn coed. Mae'n gartref i Addysg, Chwaraeon, Drama, a chyrsiau cyfrwng Cymraeg. Mae llety ar y campws, cyfleusterau chwaraeon, a bar Undeb y Myfyrwyr.

en: The Lampeter campus in Ceredigion is UWTSD's oldest and smallest campus — one of the oldest degree-awarding institutions in the UK! It's a beautiful, rural campus known for Humanities, Religion, Archaeology, Welsh Studies, and alternative/holistic programmes. Great for students who prefer a quieter, community feel. Address: Lampeter SA48 7ED.

Lampeter (Llanbedr Pont Steffan) is a unique, historic campus in rural West Wales. It was founded in 1822 — older than many famous UK universities! Known for Humanities, Theology, and Welsh medium courses. Very small and community-focused. Located in Ceredigion, SA48 7ED.
cy: Mae campws Llanbedr Pont Steffan yng Ngheredigion yn gampws hynaf a lleiaf PCYDDS — un o'r sefydliadau dyfarnu graddau hynaf yn y DU! Mae'n gampws gwledig hardd sy'n adnabyddus am Ddyniaethau, Crefydd, Archaeoleg, Astudiaethau Cymraeg.

Mae Llanbedr Pont Steffan yn gampws unigryw, hanesyddol yng nghefn gwlad Gorllewin Cymru. Sefydlwyd ym 1822 — yn hŷn na llawer o brifysgolion enwog y DU! Adnabyddus am Ddyniaethau, Diwinyddiaeth, a chyrsiau cyfrwng Cymraeg.

en: UWTSD has libraries at each campus with extensive physical and digital resources. You can access the library catalogue at library.uwtsd.ac.uk to search for books, journals, and e-resources. Students get a library card and can borrow up to 6 books at once. There are also 24/7 online resources including databases, e-books, and academic journals. Opening hours vary by campus and term time.

UWTSD libraries offer books, e-books, academic journals, study spaces, and printing. Access the catalogue at library.uwtsd.ac.uk using your student login. Key features: inter-library loans, 1-to-1 support sessions with library staff, and access to databases like JSTOR and ProQuest. For opening hours contact library@uwtsd.ac.uk or visit the library homepage.
cy: Mae gan PCYDDS lyfrgelloedd ym mhob campws gydag adnoddau ffisegol a digidol helaeth. Gallwch gyrchu catalog y llyfrgell ar library.uwtsd.ac.uk i chwilio am lyfrau, cyfnodolion, ac e-adnoddau. Mae myfyrwyr yn cael cerdyn llyfrgell a gallant fenthyca hyd at 6 llyfr ar y tro.
Mae llyfrgelloedd PCYDDS yn cynnig llyfrau, e-lyfrau, cyfnodolion academaidd, mannau astudio, ac argraffu. Cyrchwch y catalog ar library.uwtsd.ac.uk gan ddefnyddio'ch mewngofnodiad myfyrwyr.

en: UWTSD has a dedicated Student Wellbeing team to support you through any difficulties. Whether you're feeling stressed, anxious, or struggling with personal issues, help is available. Contact the Wellbeing team at wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk or call the Student Services team. You can also drop in to Student Services on campus. You're not alone — asking for help is a sign of strength! 💚

Your wellbeing matters at UWTSD. The Student Wellbeing service offers counselling, mental health support, and crisis guidance. Email wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk to make an appointment or find out more. There are also free workshops and resources on managing stress, anxiety, and study-life balance. Don't suffer in silence — support is just an email away!
cy: Mae gan PCYDDS dîm Lles Myfyrwyr pwrpasol i'ch cefnogi drwy unrhyw anawsterau. P'un a ydych chi'n teimlo dan straen, yn bryderus, neu'n cael trafferth â phroblemau personol, mae help ar gael. Cysylltwch â'r tîm Lles ar wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk. Nid ydych chi ar eich pen eich hun — mae gofyn am help yn arwydd o gryfder! 💚
Mae eich lles yn bwysig ym PCYDDS. Mae'r gwasanaeth Lles Myfyrwyr yn cynnig cwnsela, cymorth iechyd meddwl, a chanllawiau argyfwng. Anfonwch e-bost at wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk i wneud apwyntiad.

en: I'm really sorry to hear you're feeling this way. Please reach out for help right now: Samaritans: 116 123 (free, 24/7), Crisis Text Line: Text SHOUT to 85258, UWTSD Wellbeing: wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk, NHS 111 for urgent medical help, PAPYRUS (under 35): 0800 068 4141. You are not alone, and things can get better. Please talk to someone today. 💚

You matter, and help is available right now. Please contact: Samaritans 116 123 (24/7, free), text SHOUT to 85258, or go to your nearest A&E if you're in immediate danger. UWTSD Wellbeing (wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk) can also provide urgent support during working hours. You don't have to face this alone. 💚
cy: Mae'n ddrwg iawn gennyf glywed eich bod chi'n teimlo fel hyn. Gofynnwch am help nawr: Samaritans: 116 123 (am ddim, 24/7), Llinell Destun Argyfwng: Tecstiwch SHOUT i 85258, Lles PCYDDS: wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk, GIG 111 am help meddygol brys, PAPYRUS (o dan 35): 0800 068 4141. Nid ydych chi ar eich pen eich hun, a gall pethau wella. Siaradwch â rhywun heddiw. 💚

Rydych chi'n bwysig, ac mae help ar gael nawr. Cysylltwch â: Samaritans 116 123 (24/7, am ddim), tecstiwch SHOUT i 85258, neu ewch i'ch Adran Achosion Brys agosaf os ydych chi mewn perygl uniongyrchol. 💚

en: UWTSD has an Additional Learning Support Service (ALSS) to help students with disabilities, dyslexia, mental health conditions, and other learning difficulties. Support may include extra exam time, note-takers, assistive technology, and study skills sessions. You may also be eligible for a Disabled Students' Allowance (DSA) from Student Finance Wales. Contact alss@uwtsd.ac.uk to arrange an assessment.

The ALSS team at UWTSD supports students with: dyslexia, ADHD, autism, physical disabilities, mental health conditions, and more. Support is confidential and personalised. Start by contacting alss@uwtsd.ac.uk for an initial chat. DSA funding from Student Finance Wales can provide equipment and support workers. Early contact is recommended!
cy: Mae gan PCYDDS Wasanaeth Cymorth Dysgu Ychwanegol (CCYA) i helpu myfyrwyr ag anableddau, dyslecsia, cyflyrau iechyd meddwl, ac anawsterau dysgu eraill. Cysylltwch ag alss@uwtsd.ac.uk i drefnu asesiad.

Mae tîm CCYA ym PCYDDS yn cefnogi myfyrwyr â: dyslecsia, ADHD, awtistiaeth, anableddau corfforol, cyflyrau iechyd meddwl, a mwy. Mae cymorth yn gyfrinachol ac wedi'i bersonoli. Dechreuwch drwy gysylltu ag alss@uwtsd.ac.uk.

en: UWTSD Students' Union (UWTSD SU) is at uwtsdsu.co.uk. They organise events, clubs, societies, and represent student interests to the university. From sports clubs to arts societies, film nights to volunteering, there's something for everyone! The SU also has welfare officers and a free advice service. Get involved — it makes your university experience so much better!

The Students' Union is the heart of student social life at UWTSD! Find clubs and societies at uwtsdsu.co.uk. They run freshers' events, sports teams, cultural societies, and provide student representation. The SU bar is also a popular social hub at some campuses. Join early in the year to make the most of it!
cy: Mae Undeb Myfyrwyr PCYDDS ar uwtsdsu.co.uk. Maent yn trefnu digwyddiadau, clybiau, cymdeithasau, ac yn cynrychioli buddiannau myfyrwyr i'r brifysgol. O glybiau chwaraeon i gymdeithasau celf, nosweithiau ffilm i wirfoddoli, mae rhywbeth i bawb!

Undeb y Myfyrwyr yw calon bywyd cymdeithasol myfyrwyr ym PCYDDS! Dewch o hyd i glybiau a chymdeithasau ar uwtsdsu.co.uk. Maent yn rhedeg digwyddiadau gwyrddion, timau chwaraeon, cymdeithasau diwylliannol, ac yn darparu cynrychiolaeth myfyrwyr.

en: UWTSD graduation ceremonies are typically held in summer (July) and winter (December/January) each year. You'll receive an invitation when you've completed your degree. Gown hire is arranged through the graduation service. Ceremonies are usually held at the campuses or local venues. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/graduation for ceremony dates and how to register.

Graduation at UWTSD is a fantastic celebration! Ceremonies are usually in summer. You'll need to register your attendance and arrange gown hire. Family and friends are invited — normally 2-3 guests per graduate. Your degree certificate is presented on the day. Visit uwtsd.ac.uk/graduation for the latest information.
cy: Mae seremonïau graddio PCYDDS fel arfer yn cael eu cynnal yn yr haf (Gorffennaf) a'r gaeaf (Rhagfyr/Ionawr) bob blwyddyn. Byddwch yn derbyn gwahoddiad pan fyddwch chi wedi cwblhau eich gradd. Edrychwch ar pcydds.ac.uk/graddio am ddyddiadau seremoni.

Mae graddio ym PCYDDS yn ddathliad gwych! Mae seremonïau fel arfer yn yr haf. Bydd angen i chi gofrestru eich presenoldeb a threfnu llogi gŵn. Mae teulu a ffrindiau'n cael gwahoddiad — fel arfer 2-3 gwestai fesul graddiad.

patterns: how do I see my marks

en: Your results and grades are available through the MyStudy portal at mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk. You can view module results, assignment feedback, and your overall academic record there. Results are usually released within a few weeks of completing assessments. For any queries about marks, contact your lecturer or academic department directly.

Check your grades on MyStudy (mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk) — results are posted there after each assessment period. UK degree classifications are: First Class (70%+), 2:1 (60-69%), 2:2 (50-59%), Third (40-49%). If you believe a mark is wrong, you can formally appeal — contact your Student Registry for the appeals process.
cy: Mae eich canlyniadau a graddau ar gael drwy borth MyStudy ar mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk. Gallwch weld canlyniadau modiwlau, adborth aseiniad, a'ch cofnod academaidd cyffredinol yno.

Gwiriwch eich graddau ar MyStudy (mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk) — mae canlyniadau'n cael eu postio yno ar ôl pob cyfnod asesu. Dosbarthiadau gradd DU: Dosbarth Cyntaf (70%+), 2:1 (60-69%), 2:2 (50-59%), Trydedd (40-49%).

en: UWTSD is a proudly bilingual university! Many courses are available through the medium of Welsh, especially at Carmarthen and Lampeter campuses. You can also receive additional support in Welsh and there are Welsh-medium social spaces and events. Welsh medium students may be eligible for a Welsh Language Bursary. Contact cymraeg@uwtsd.ac.uk for more information.

Welsh is at the heart of UWTSD! The university offers Welsh-medium and bilingual teaching across many subjects. The Carmarthen and Lampeter campuses especially have a strong Welsh culture. If you want to study or get support in Welsh, contact cymraeg@uwtsd.ac.uk. There are also Welsh language improvement courses available for non-Welsh speakers!
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn brifysgol ddwyieithog falch! Mae llawer o gyrsiau ar gael trwy gyfrwng y Gymraeg, yn enwedig ar gampysau Caerfyrddin a Llanbedr Pont Steffan. Gallwch hefyd gael cymorth ychwanegol yn Gymraeg. Cysylltwch â cymraeg@pcydds.ac.uk am fwy o wybodaeth.

Mae'r Gymraeg wrth galon PCYDDS! Mae'r brifysgol yn cynnig addysgu cyfrwng Cymraeg a dwyieithog ar draws llawer o bynciau. Cysylltwch â cymraeg@pcydds.ac.uk. Mae cyrsiau gwella Cymraeg hefyd ar gael ar gyfer y rhai nad ydynt yn siarad Cymraeg!

en: UWTSD (University of Wales Trinity Saint David) was formed in 2010 through a merger of Trinity University College Carmarthen and Swansea Metropolitan University. It's one of Wales' leading universities with a heritage dating back to 1822 (Lampeter campus). UWTSD is known for excellent teaching quality, student satisfaction, and strong links to Welsh culture and language. The university has around 10,000+ students.

UWTSD is a proud Welsh university with roots going back 200 years! Known for strong teaching, practical courses, and a focus on student wellbeing. It performs well in student satisfaction surveys and has received commendations for teaching quality. UWTSD is accredited by the Quality Assurance Agency (QAA) and many courses have professional accreditations.
cy: Sefydlwyd PCYDDS (Prifysgol Cymru Y Drindod Dewi Sant) yn 2010 drwy uno Coleg Prifysgol y Drindod Caerfyrddin a Phrifysgol Fetropolitan Abertawe. Mae'n un o brifysgolion blaenllaw Cymru gyda threftadaeth yn dyddio'n ôl i 1822 (campws Llanbedr Pont Steffan). Mae PCYDDS yn adnabyddus am ansawdd addysgu rhagorol a boddhad myfyrwyr.

Mae PCYDDS yn brifysgol Gymreig falch gyda gwreiddiau'n mynd yn ôl 200 mlynedd! Yn adnabyddus am addysgu cryf, cyrsiau ymarferol, a ffocws ar les myfyrwyr. Mae PCYDDS wedi'i achredu gan yr Asiantaeth Sicrhau Ansawdd (QAA).

en: To contact UWTSD: General enquiries: 01267 676767 or enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk. Admissions: admissions@uwtsd.ac.uk or 01267 676767. Student Services: studentservices@uwtsd.ac.uk. IT Services: itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk or 01792 481 111. Wellbeing: wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk. Website: uwtsd.ac.uk

Main UWTSD contact details: Phone: 01267 676767 (general), Website: uwtsd.ac.uk, Email: enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk. Each department has its own contact — just ask me what you need and I can give you the right contact details!
cy: I gysylltu â PCYDDS: Ymholiadau cyffredinol: 01267 676767 neu enquiries@pcydds.ac.uk. Derbyniadau: admissions@pcydds.ac.uk. Gwasanaethau Myfyrwyr: studentservices@pcydds.ac.uk. Gwasanaethau TG: itservices@pcydds.ac.uk neu 01792 481 111. Lles: wellbeing@pcydds.ac.uk. Gwefan: pcydds.ac.uk
Prif fanylion cyswllt PCYDDS: Ffôn: 01267 676767, Gwefan: pcydds.ac.uk, E-bost: enquiries@pcydds.ac.uk. Mae gan bob adran ei gyswllt ei hun — gofynnwch i mi beth sydd ei angen arnoch chi!

patterns: dod o hyd i swydd ar ôl y brifysgol

en: UWTSD has a Careers and Employability service to help you with job searching, CV writing, interview preparation, and career planning. You can access careers advice throughout your studies and after graduation. Contact careers@uwtsd.ac.uk or visit the Careers Service in Student Services on campus. Many courses also include work placements to boost your employability!

The Careers team at UWTSD offers 1-to-1 appointments, CV reviews, mock interviews, and access to job vacancy boards. Get in touch at careers@uwtsd.ac.uk. UWTSD also has strong links with local and national employers — many run placement years and graduate schemes. Start engaging with the Careers Service early in your degree!
cy: Mae gan PCYDDS wasanaeth Gyrfaoedd a Chyflogadwyedd i'ch helpu gyda chwilio am swyddi, ysgrifennu CV, paratoi ar gyfer cyfweliadau, a chynllunio gyrfa. Cysylltwch â careers@pcydds.ac.uk.

Mae tîm Gyrfaoedd ym PCYDDS yn cynnig apwyntiadau un-i-un, adolygiadau CV, cyfweliadau ffug, a mynediad at fyrddau swyddi gwag. Cysylltwch â careers@pcydds.ac.uk. Mae PCYDDS hefyd yn cael cysylltiadau cryf â chyflogwyr lleol a chenedlaethol.

patterns: ar ei hôl hi gyda gwaith cwrs
yn cael trafferth â llwyth gwaith

en: It sounds like you're going through a really tough time — this is very common and completely understandable! Here's what can help: 1) Talk to your personal tutor — they can offer extensions or support. 2) Contact Wellbeing at wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk. 3) Use the library for study skills help. 4) Break work into small chunks and tackle one thing at a time. You've got this! 💪

Exam and assignment stress is something most students experience. UWTSD has great support: your personal tutor can advise on extensions, Wellbeing (wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk) offers counselling, and the Students' Union has a welfare officer. Also check out study skills workshops through the library — they really help with time management and revision techniques!
cy: Mae'n swnio fel eich bod chi'n mynd drwy gyfnod anodd iawn — mae hyn yn gyffredin iawn ac yn gwbl ddealladwy! Dyma beth all helpu: 1) Siaradwch â'ch tiwtor personol — gallant gynnig estyniadau neu gymorth. 2) Cysylltwch â Lles ar wellbeing@pcydds.ac.uk. 3) Defnyddiwch y llyfrgell am help sgiliau astudio. Mae gyda chi! 💪

Mae straen arholiadau ac aseiniad yn rhywbeth y mae'r rhan fwyaf o fyfyrwyr yn ei brofi. Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig cymorth gwych: gall eich tiwtor personol gynghori ar estyniadau, mae Lles (wellbeing@pcydds.ac.uk) yn cynnig cwnsela, a gallwch fynychu gweithdai sgiliau astudio.

en: Your timetable is available on the MyStudy portal at mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk. Log in with your student credentials and look for the timetable section. Timetables are usually published a few weeks before the start of term. If your timetable looks wrong or you're missing a module, contact your department administrator or Student Registry.

Check MyStudy (mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk) for your personal timetable. It shows all your lectures, seminars, and lab sessions. If you have a timetable clash or issue, speak to your Programme Director or contact Student Registry at registry@uwtsd.ac.uk.
cy: Mae eich amserlen ar gael ar borth MyStudy ar mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk. Mewngofnodwch gyda'ch manylion myfyrwyr a chwiliwch am yr adran amserlen.
Gwiriwch MyStudy (mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk) am eich amserlen bersonol. Mae'n dangos eich holl ddarlithoedd, seminarau, a sesiynau labordy. Os oes gwrthdrawiad amserlen, siaradwch â'ch Cyfarwyddwr Rhaglen.

en: UWTSD provides printing facilities across all campuses. You can print from library computers or connect your own device to the print system. Printing is usually charged to a print credit account — you can top this up on campus. Contact IT Services at itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk or your campus library for details on how to set up and use printing.

Printing is available in UWTSD libraries and computer labs. You'll need print credits on your student account — these can be purchased on campus. Black and white printing is cheaper than colour. For help setting up printing on your personal device, visit the IT Services page or call 01792 481 111.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn darparu cyfleusterau argraffu ar draws pob campws. Gallwch argraffu o gyfrifiaduron y llyfrgell neu gysylltu eich dyfais eich hun â'r system argraffu. Mae argraffu fel arfer yn cael ei godi i gyfrif credyd argraffu.
Mae argraffu ar gael mewn llyfrgelloedd a labordai cyfrifiadur PCYDDS. Bydd angen credydau argraffu arnoch chi ar eich cyfrif myfyrwyr — gellir eu prynu ar y campws.

patterns: beth mae gwasanaethau myfyrwyr yn ei wneud

en: Student Services at UWTSD is your one-stop shop for support! They offer help with: Wellbeing and counselling, Disability and additional learning support, Careers advice, Financial hardship, International student support, Accommodation queries. Find Student Services at your campus or email studentservices@uwtsd.ac.uk.

UWTSD Student Services covers almost everything you need outside of your studies! Wellbeing, careers, finance, accommodation, disability support, and more. They're based on each campus and also reachable at studentservices@uwtsd.ac.uk. Don't be afraid to reach out — they're there to help you succeed!
cy: Gwasanaethau Myfyrwyr ym PCYDDS yw eich siop-un-stop am gymorth! Maent yn cynnig help gyda: Lles a chwnsela, Cymorth anabledd a dysgu ychwanegol, Cyngor gyrfaoedd, Caledi ariannol, Cymorth myfyrwyr rhyngwladol, Ymholiadau llety. Anfonwch e-bost at studentservices@pcydds.ac.uk.

Mae Gwasanaethau Myfyrwyr PCYDDS yn ymdrin â bron popeth sydd ei angen arnoch chi y tu allan i'ch astudiaethau! Lles, gyrfaoedd, cyllid, llety, cymorth anabledd, a mwy. Cysylltwch â studentservices@pcydds.ac.uk.

en: UWTSD offers academic English language support through the library and Learning Support teams. Help includes academic writing workshops, grammar support, and 1-to-1 writing consultations. International students can also access additional ESOL support. Contact learningsupport@uwtsd.ac.uk for information on available sessions.

Need help with your academic writing or English language skills? UWTSD's Learning Support team runs workshops and drop-in sessions. The library also has academic writing guides and resources. Contact alss@uwtsd.ac.uk or the library at library@uwtsd.ac.uk. Many departments also have subject-specific writing support.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig cymorth iaith Saesneg academaidd trwy'r llyfrgell a thimau Cymorth Dysgu. Mae cymorth yn cynnwys gweithdai ysgrifennu academaidd, cymorth gramadeg, ac ymgynghoriadau ysgrifennu un-i-un. Cysylltwch â learningsupport@pcydds.ac.uk.

Oes angen help arnoch chi gyda'ch ysgrifennu academaidd neu sgiliau iaith Saesneg? Mae tîm Cymorth Dysgu PCYDDS yn rhedeg gweithdai a sesiynau galw-i-mewn. Cysylltwch ag alss@pcydds.ac.uk neu'r llyfrgell ar library@pcydds.ac.uk.
